.spin { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .progress-bar { transition: width 0.5s ease-in-out; line-height: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; } .modal-dialog-centered { display: flex; align-items: center; min-height: calc(100% - 1rem); } .card { border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .table td { vertical-align: middle; } .btn-group .btn { white-space: nowrap; }
